playbook.intent: Untested prototype slot -> moderated session logged + same-day critical-issue triage.
playbook.scope: Researcher moderates one usability session on a prototype. Includes brief, task-by-task moderation, observation capture, critical issue triage, and same-day fix-list update. Done when session log is filed and critical issues are flagged with engineering.

success-criteria.criterion: Critical issues flagged for fix triage same day
Session log filed with consistent naming

stage.name: Brief participant
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when consent is confirmed.

stage.name: Run tasks

tasks.task: Observe without prompting; ask why after

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when all tasks are run.

stage.name: Probe critical incidents

tasks.task: Ask follow-up on each fail or hesitation

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after probes are exhausted.

stage.name: Wrap + thank
stage.decision-gate: Advance when participant is thanked and dismissed.

stage.name: Same-day triage
stage.intent: Push critical issues into the team's queue today.

tasks.task: Flag critical issues to engineering / design lead
File session log + recording in repo

stage.decision-gate: Done when critical issues have tickets the same day.

extra.value: [Leading the participant -> contaminated signal, Waiting until next day to triage -> momentum lost, No probe on hesitation -> 'they figured it out' becomes the misleading story]
['Did I avoid leading the participant?', 'Did critical issues get tickets today?', 'Is the log filed with consistent naming?']

{human: faion get-content usability-test-moderation-single-session --format md, agent: faion get-content usability-test-moderation-single-session --format context, json: faion get-content usability-test-moderation-single-session --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
